summary: Comprehensive test suite with strong coverage of core functions (Get-SecretStatus, Invoke-SecretRotationValidator, formatters) and excellent GitHub Actions integration testing. TDD approach well-demonstrated with clear fixture setup and helper functions. Act integration tests properly verify exit codes, output content, and job success. Main gaps: limited edge case testing for data validation (malformed JSON, empty arrays, invalid dates, special characters), only two act test cases, and some assertions could be more specific. Would effectively catch regressions in normal workflows but might miss data-validation edge cases.
